overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a sci-fi vehicle navigating through extremely dense fog toward a massive rocky mountain formation on an alien planet. The scene features a persistent holographic HUD overlay with orange targeting displays, and the vehicle maintains a slow, steady approach as the jagged rock face gradually emerges from the mist.

events.description: small floating debris becomes visible on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: piloting a vehicle slowly forward through dense fog toward a distant mountain silhouette

entered.detail: large silhouetted mountain formation barely visible through the thick fog ahead
dense gray fog obscuring visibility throughout the scene
tall thin rock formation visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person cockpit view driving through extremely dense fog. A massive rocky mountain formation looms ahead, barely visible as a dark silhouette. The atmosphere is thick with gray mist, and a distant rock spire can be seen on the left. Around the 12-second mark, small floating debris appears on the right side, suggesting a low-gravity or atmospheric anomaly.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain approach with emerging rock details

events.description: vehicle slightly adjusts course to the right while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: continuing the approach toward the mountain, navigating through the fog with slight course corrections

entered.detail: sharp rocky outcroppings becoming visible on the left side of the approach
small rocks or debris suspended in the fog on the right side

segments.scene_description: As the vehicle advances, the mountain formation grows larger and more defined in the center frame. Jagged rock formations emerge from the fog on the left, while floating debris becomes more prominent on the right. The distant rock spire from the previous segment passes out of view behind the vehicle. The fog remains dense but the rocky textures become increasingly visible as the distance closes.

scene_state.functional_zone: close proximity to mountain cliff face

events.description: fog density decreases slightly revealing high detail rock textures and crevices

agents.ego_description: approaching very close to the massive rock face, navigating the final distance to the mountain cliff

entered.detail: steep vertical cliff face of the mountain now dominating the forward view
rough craggy surface details and erosion patterns visible on the rock face
deep cracks and fissures in the rock structure on the left side

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the vehicle closes to within close proximity of the massive mountain cliff. The rock face fills the center of the frame with detailed textures, crags, and crevices now clearly visible. The fog thins slightly, revealing the steep vertical surfaces and deep fissures in the rock. The floating debris and distant formations from earlier segments are no longer visible as the vehicle focuses on the imposing cliff wall ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit perspective as a vehicle navigates through a dense, oppressive fog toward an imposing alien mountain. It begins with the mountain appearing as a mere dark silhouette amidst thick gray mist, with a distant rock spire visible to the left and small pieces of floating debris drifting on the right. As the vehicle advances, the mountain grows larger and more defined in the center frame, while the jagged rock formations on the left emerge more clearly from the haze. The scene then shifts as the distant spire vanishes behind the vehicle and the floating debris fades, allowing the rocky textures to become increasingly prominent. Finally, the fog thins slightly as the vehicle closes in on the massive cliff, filling the frame with the detailed crags, deep fissures, and steep vertical surfaces of the imposing rock wall.
